    • testAddAccount_validAccount_shouldBeAdded

      @Test @DisplayName("addAccount: Valid account should be added successfully") static void testAddAccount_validAccount_shouldBeAdded()

      @Test @DisplayName("addAccount: Null account should be ignored") void testAddAccount_nullAccount_shouldBeIgnored()

      @Test @DisplayName("addAccount: Account with null ID should be ignored") void testAddAccount_accountWithNullId_shouldBeIgnored()

      @Test @DisplayName("addAccount: Account with blank ID should be ignored") void testAddAccount_accountWithBlankId_shouldBeIgnored()

    • testAddAccount_multipleDistinctAccounts_shouldAllBeAdded

      @Test @DisplayName("addAccount: Multiple distinct accounts should all be added") void testAddAccount_multipleDistinctAccounts_shouldAllBeAdded()

    • testAddAccount_duplicateId_shouldBeAdded

      @Test @DisplayName("addAccount: Account with duplicate ID should also be added (current behavior)") void testAddAccount_duplicateId_shouldBeAdded()

    • testGetAllAccounts_whenEmpty_shouldReturnEmptyList

      @Test @DisplayName("getAllAccounts: When no accounts added, should return an empty list") void testGetAllAccounts_whenEmpty_shouldReturnEmptyList()

    • testGetAllAccounts_withAddedAccounts_shouldReturnAllAccounts

      @Test @DisplayName("getAllAccounts: After adding accounts, should return list with those accounts") void testGetAllAccounts_withAddedAccounts_shouldReturnAllAccounts()

    • testGetAllAccounts_ensureReturnedListIsCopy

      @Test @DisplayName("getAllAccounts: Ensure returned list is a copy") void testGetAllAccounts_ensureReturnedListIsCopy()

    • testGetBalanceResults_whenNoAccounts_shouldReturnEmptyList

      @Test @DisplayName("getBalanceResults: When no accounts, should return empty list") void testGetBalanceResults_whenNoAccounts_shouldReturnEmptyList()

    • testGetBalanceResults_withAccounts_shouldReturnCorrectAccountBalances

      @Test @DisplayName("getBalanceResults: With accounts, should return correct AccountBalance objects") void testGetBalanceResults_withAccounts_shouldReturnCorrectAccountBalances()

    • testRemoveAccount_existingId_shouldRemoveAccountAndReturnTrue

      @Test @DisplayName("removeAccount: Existing ID should remove account and return true") void testRemoveAccount_existingId_shouldRemoveAccountAndReturnTrue()

    • testRemoveAccount_nonExistentId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse

      @Test @DisplayName("removeAccount: Non-existent ID should do nothing and return false") void testRemoveAccount_nonExistentId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse()

    • testRemoveAccount_nullId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse

      @Test @DisplayName("removeAccount: Null ID should do nothing and return false") void testRemoveAccount_nullId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse()

    • testRemoveAccount_blankId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse

      @Test @DisplayName("removeAccount: Blank ID should do nothing and return false") void testRemoveAccount_blankId_shouldDoNothingAndReturnFalse()

    • testRemoveAccount_removingLastAccount_shouldResultInEmptyList

      @Test @DisplayName("removeAccount: Removing last account should result in empty list") void testRemoveAccount_removingLastAccount_shouldResultInEmptyList()

      @Test @DisplayName("clearAccounts: After adding and then clearing, lists should be empty") void testClearAccounts_shouldEmptyTheAccountList()
